titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale University Building Assignment Plans
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday March 21, 2020 at 08:10
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.abstract: The records consist of assignment plans showing, by floor, the complete layout of various Yale buildings at the time the drawings were rendered.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-A (YRG 46-A), Records and materials broadly documenting Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale University Building Assignment Plans (RU 4). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by region/chronology (building) code.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of assignment plans showing, by floor, the complete layout of various Yale buildings at the time the drawings were rendered.

did.unittitle: Assignment plans for Yale University buildings
13:18 Becton Engineering and Applied Science Building, no date
20:20 Kline Addition to the Sterling Chemistry Laboratory
22:67 Farnam Memorial Building, Brady Memorial Laboratories, Lauder Hall
22:167 Laboratories of Epidemiology and Public Health

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.
